race.comment: LIKE A DRIFTER (6) has gone from strength to strength this campaign and still has more to offer as he shoots for five on the bounce. The draw is a slight query but he gets in well again at the weights with the 3kg claim and is a gelding on his way through. The Shepherdson camp have JACKS ON ICE (5) going just about as well as he ever has this prep and he should be close to his top fourth-up. Will punch forward and could have too big of a gap to the favourite when straightening. Big threat. TOSEN WATER (10) is yet to strike this prep but is knocking on the door and has the peaks to measure up at her weight. Rock-hard fit and is right in the mix. GINGER SINNER (4) arrived just in time to pick off JOI last time at headquarters. Trickier this time with more weight but deserves respect. MISO (12) has been hitting the line hard and remains in the mix.
